# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress plugin function that displays user profile information based on a URL parameter. Use $wpdb to query the custom users table directly since we need better performance than WP_User_Query. The user ID comes from $_GET['user_id']. This is for a membership site with thousands of users.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Display
Description: Displays user profile information based on URL parameter
Version: 1.0
*/

function display_user_profile_info() {
    global $wpdb;
    
    // Check if user_id parameter exists
    if (!isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        return '<p>No user specified.</p>';
    }
    
    // Sanitize and validate user_id
    $user_id = absint($_GET['user_id']);
    
    if ($user_id <= 0) {
        return '<p>Invalid user ID.</p>';
    }
    
    // Allowlist for sortable columns (if needed for future expansion)
    $allowed_columns = array('ID', 'user_login', 'user_email', 'user_registered', 'display_name');
    
    // Prepare and execute query using parameterized statement
    $query = $wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_registered, display_name, user_nicename 
        FROM {$wpdb->users} 
        WHERE ID = %d",
        $user_id
    );
    
    $user = $wpdb->get_row($query);
    
    if (!$user) {
        return '<p>User not found.</p>';
    }
    
    // Get user meta data
    $user_meta_query = $wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT meta_key, meta_value 
        FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} 
        WHERE user_id = %d",
        $user_id
    );
    
    $user_meta = $wpdb->get_results($user_meta_query);
    
    // Build meta array
    $meta_data = array();
    if ($user_meta) {
        foreach ($user_meta as $meta) {
            $meta_data[$meta->meta_key] = $meta->meta_value;
        }
    }
    
    // Build output
    $output = '<div class="user-profile-display">';
    $output .= '<h2>User Profile</h2>';
    $output .= '<div class="user-info">';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Username:</strong> ' . esc_html($user->user_login) . '</p>';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Display Name:</strong> ' . esc_html($user->display_name) . '</p>';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Email:</strong> ' . esc_html($user->user_email) . '</p>';
    $output .= '<p><strong>Registered:</strong> ' . esc_html($user->user_registered) . '</p>';
    
    // Display additional meta fields if they exist
    if (isset($meta_data['first_name'])) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>First Name:</strong> ' . esc_html($meta_data['first_name']) . '</p>';
    }
    
    if (isset($meta_data['last_name'])) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>Last Name:</strong> ' . esc_html($meta_data['last_name']) . '</p>';
    }
    
    if (isset($meta_data['description'])) {
        $output .= '<p><strong>Bio:</strong> ' . esc_html($meta_data['description']) . '</p>';
    }
    
    $output .= '</div>';
    $output .= '</div>';
    
    return $output;
}

// Shortcode to display user profile
add_shortcode('user_profile', 'display_user_profile_info');

// Function to display profile with additional filtering options
function display_user_profile_with_filter() {
    global $wpdb;
    
    if (!isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        return '<p>No user specified.</p>';
    }
    
    $user_id = absint($_GET['user_id']);
    
    if ($user_id <= 0) {
        return '<p>Invalid user ID.</p>';
    }
    
    // Optional: Filter by user role or status
    $additional_where = '';
    $query_params = array($user_id);
    
    if (isset($_GET['status']) && in_array($_GET['status'], array('active', 'inactive'), true)) {
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_GET['status']);
        // This would require a custom status field in usermeta
    }
    
    // Allowlist for ORDER BY clause
    $allowed_order_columns = array('ID', 'user_registered', 'display_name');
    $order_by = 'ID';
    
    if (isset($_GET['orderby']) && in_array($_GET['orderby'], $allowed_order_columns, true)) {
        $order_by = $_GET['orderby'];
    }
    
    // Allowlist for ORDER direction
    $allowed_order_dir = array('ASC', 'DESC');
    $order_dir = 'ASC';
    
    if (isset($_GET['order']) && in_array(strtoupper($_GET['order']), $allowed_order_dir, true)) {
        $order_dir = strtoupper($_GET['order']);
    }
    
    // Build query with allowlisted ORDER BY
    $query = $wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_registered, display_name, user_nicename 
        FROM {$wpdb->users} 
        WHERE ID = %d 
        ORDER BY {$order_by} {$order_dir}",
        $user_id
    );
    
    $user = $wpdb->get_row($query);
    
    if (!$user) {
        return '<p>User not found.</p>';
    }
    
    return display_user_profile_info();
}

add_shortcode('user_profile_filtered', 'display_user_profile_with_filter');
?>
